summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Card Wholesale Ordering System MVP. Both backend APIs and frontend UI are functioning perfectly with all core features working as expected.

design_issues.issue: Initial CSS compilation error with Tailwind @apply directive - FIXED during testing
design_issues.fix_applied: Removed 'group' from @apply directive in App.css line 49

passed_tests: Admin login with default credentials (admin@cardwholesale.com / admin123)
Admin dashboard loads with correct stats (Total Orders: 1, Pending Orders: 1, Total Retailers: 1, Card Designs: 1)
Admin user approval functionality working
Admin card management page accessible with Add Card functionality
Admin order management page showing existing orders
Retailer registration API endpoint working
Retailer login after admin approval working
Card catalog API accessible by authenticated users
Order placement API working correctly
Google OAuth button present and functional on login page
Registration page renders with proper form fields
Protected route authentication working (redirects to login when unauthenticated)
Admin navigation between dashboard sections working
Logout functionality working
Backend API comprehensive test suite: 100% success rate (10/10 tests passed)
Frontend UI loads correctly after CSS fix
Admin dashboard stats display correctly
User approval panel accessible
Card management interface functional
Order management interface showing data
